evidence_summary.m1_deterministic_reducer: reduce_membership_state, preview_next_state, apply_signed_update with ordered validation chain (network_id, created/expiry, prev_root, epoch chain, sig verification, legality, epoch advance, root recompute, replay protection via MembershipReplayCache)
evidence_summary.m2_quorum_verification: verify_membership_signatures enforces active-approver membership, threshold, duplicate signer detection, owner-signature for sensitive ops using ed25519_dalek
evidence_summary.m3_persistence_integrity: persist_membership_snapshot, load_membership_snapshot, append_membership_log_entry, load_membership_log, replay_membership_snapshot_and_log; atomic write with tmp+fsync+rename and Unix permission checks
evidence_summary.m4_daemon_enforcement_gate: check_peer_membership_active called in Phase10Controller before every backend.configure_peer(); MembershipRevoked/MembershipNotFound errors fail-closed; empty directory skips gate for bootstrap
evidence_summary.m5_policy_coupling_revoked_denied: ContextualPolicySet.evaluate_with_membership() denies revoked/unknown nodes before ACL rule evaluation in crates/rustynet-policy/src/lib.rs
evidence_summary.m6_cli_subcommands: rustynet membership propose/sign-update/apply-update/verify-update/status all implemented in crates/rustynet-cli/src/main.rs
evidence_summary.m7_governance_runbook: documents/operations/MembershipGovernanceRunbook.md covers add-node, revoke, key-rotation, and incident-drill procedures
evidence_summary.m8_ci_gates_script: scripts/ci/membership_gates.sh runs cargo clippy, cargo test membership, and membership_gates binary
